benchmark.title: Synthetic Legacy Benchmark Fixture
benchmark.description: Fixture-only benchmark input for deterministic v1 normalization.

theory.name: Synthetic Relay Theory
theory.summary: A fixture-only theory used to test receipt conformance.

summary: MAC Bench 0.1.0-alpha.1 put Synthetic Relay Theory through three adversarial filters. The human review found that it was strained by the Provenance Flip, Synesthesia, and Blindsight. That leaves 3 testable experiments worth running.
